references.text: De Smet, Y, C Granados Mendoza, S Wanke, P Goetghebeur & M-S Samain. 2015. Molecular phylogenetics and new (infra)generic classification to alleviate polyphyly in tribe Hydrangeeae (Cornales: Hydrangeaceae). Taxon 64: 741-753
Hwang Shumei. 1987. A preliminary study on Dichroa Lour. Acta Phytotaxonomica Sinica 25: 384-389
McClintock, E. 1957. A monograph of the genus Hydrangea. Proceedings of the California Academy of Sciences 29: 147-256
Samain, M-S, S Wanke & P Goetghebeur. 2010. Unraveling extensive paraphyly in the genus Hydrangea s.l. with implications for the systematics of tribe Hydrangeeae. Systematic Botany 35: 593-600
Sodusta, PJA & BCE Lumawag. 2019. Hydrangea ofeliae nom. nov. (Hydrangeaceae) from the Philippines. Phytotaxa 411: 123-124.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 11 August 2024

species.citation: S.Vidal , Revis. Pl. Vasc. Filip. (1886) 124 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 218; Pan et al., Fl. China 8 (2001) 269; Type: Vidal 1362 (MA, syn), Luzon: Lepanto. = Deutzia acuminata Merr. , PJS 12c (1917) 266 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 218.
species.distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. LUZON: Abra, Apayao (photos), Aurora, Benguet, Ifugao, Ilocos Sur, Mountain Province, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya, Pampanga, Zambales, PANAY.
species.notes: Commonly in the montane zone, in thickets, exposed ridges, ravines and clearings in the mossy forests. 1000-2400m.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Pieter B. Pelser, 7 June 2026

species.citation: Maxim. , Mém. Acad. Imp. Sci. St.-Pétersbourg, 7th Sér. 10 (1867) 7; ≡ Hydrangea scandens ssp. chinensis (Maxim.) McClint. , Proc. Calif. Acad. Sci. 29 (1957) 206; Type: from Taiwan. = Hydrangea lobbii Maxim. , Mém. Acad. Imp. Sci. St.-Pétersbourg, 7th Sér. 10 (1867) 15 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 219. = Hydrangea pubiramea Merr. , PJS 12c (1917) 267 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 219. = Hydrangea pubiramea var. parvifolia Merr. , PJS 12c (1917) 267 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 219.
species.distribution: China, Philippines, Taiwan. BATANES, LUZON: Apayao (photos), Aurora, Benguet, Ilocos Sur, Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya (photos), Quezon, MINDANAO: Bukidnon (photos), Cotabato (photos), Davao del Sur (photos), Misamis Occidental, Misamis Oriental (photos), NEGROS (photos), PANAY (photos).
species.notes: Batanes and Luzon to Mindanao. Absent from Palawan. Mossy forests on most of the higher mountains, also reported at c. 300m in Nueva Ecija. (300-)1000-2400m.

species.citation: (Lour.) Y.De Smet & C.Granados , Taxon 64 (2015) 750 ; Malabrigo et al., Flora of Mt Mantalingahan Protected Landscape (2023) 134; ≡ Dichroa febrifuga Lour. , Fl. Cochinch. (1790) 301 ; Fern.-Vill., Novis. App. (1880) 77; S.Vidal, Phan. Cuming. Philip. (1885) 111. = Dichroa philippinensis Schltr. , Bot. Jahrb. Syst. 52 (1914) 122 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 219; Hwang, Act. Phytotax. Sin. (1987) 386; Type: Curran & Merritt 807 (syn); Elmer 9458 (syn), Luzon.
species.distribution: Bhutan, Cambodia, China, India, ?Indonesia, Laos, Myanmar, Nepal, Philippines, Taiwan, Thailand, Vietnam. CAMIGUIN, CATANDUANES, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Apayao, Batangas, Benguet, Camarines, Camarines Sur, Ifugao, Laguna, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Davao del Sur, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAWAN, PANAY.

species.citation: Hayata , J. Coll. Sci. Imp. Univ. Tokyo 22(2) (1906) 131. = Hydrangea cuneatifolia Elmer , LPB 8 (1915) 2825. = Hydrangea glandulosa Elmer , LPB 2 (1908) 473 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 218. = Hydrangea subintegra Merr. , PJS 3c (1908) 408 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 219.
species.distribution: Philippines, Taiwan. BATAN, LEYTE, LUZON: Aurora, Benguet, Ifugao, Laguna, Mountain Province, Nueva Vizcaya, Rizal, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Cotabato, Davao, Davao del Sur, Misamis Oriental (photos), NEGROS, SIBUYAN.
species.notes: Usually in the mossy forest. Thickets or open forests. 900-2200m.

species.citation: Sodusta & Lumawag , Phytotaxa 411 (2019) 123; ≡ Dichroa platyphylla Merr. , PJS 11c (1916) 13 ; Merrill, EPFP 2 (1923) 219; Hwang, Act. Phytotax. Sin. (1987) 388; Type: BS 23416 Ramos (K, holo; L, NY, US, iso), Luzon: Sorsogon, Mt Lalao, in damp forests, 11-Aug-1915. = Dichroa thyrsoidea Elmer , LPB 10 (1939) 3807, nom. inval., in obs., pro syn.
species.distribution: Endemic to the Philippines. CATANDUANES, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Sorsogon, MINDORO.
species.notes: Damp forests at medium elevation. Note by P.B. Pelser (22-Jul-19): Hydrangea ofeliae (as Dichroa platyphylla) is considered a synonym of Hydrangea febrifuga in some online databases, but J.V. LaFrankie (pers. comm., 6-Jun-16) considers it taxonomically distinct.

species.citation: (Thunb.) Ser. , Prodr. (A. P. de Candolle) 4 (1830) 15; ≡ Viburnum macrophyllum Thunb. , Syst. Veg., 14th Ed. (1784) 295. = Hydrangea hortensia Siebold , Nov. Actorum Acad. Caes. Leop.-Carol. Nat. Cur. 14 (1828) 688.
species.notes: Unlikely to be naturalized (J.V. LaFrankie, 8-Jun-16); originally from Japan, cultivated elsewhere.
